pr_title: fix: replace generic review_lever examples with domain-specific ones
pr_description: Replace copyable generic examples in `review_lever` field descriptions and system prompt with domain-specific, non-portable examples (agriculture, urban planning, insurance) Breaks the template-lock pattern where llama3.1 copies "This lever governs the tension between…" verbatim (100% lock rate across 3 analysis rounds) and qwen3 uses "Core tension:" openers Updated in all 3 locations: `Lever.review_lever`, `LeverCleaned.review`, and system prompt section 4
